Home.title: Tiny Heroes RPG
Home.subtitle: Embark on an amazing adventure! Choose your hero, roll the dice, and create your own magical story!

dice.title: Roll Dice!
dice.description: Exciting dice rolls with exploding 6s make every action thrilling!

ai.title: AI Guide
ai.description: A smart game master creates unique adventures just for you!

fun.title: Always Fun
fun.description: Failures are funny, successes are celebrated - never scary!

SelectCharacter.title: Choose Your Hero!
SelectCharacter.subtitle: Pick a brave hero to go on amazing adventures! Each hero is special and great at different things.

sorceress.description: A person who can cast spells and do magical things

knight.description: A brave warrior who protects friends and fights for good

ranger.description: A skilled hunter who moves quietly and knows the forest

bard.description: A cheerful performer who makes friends and inspires others

strong.name: Strong Stuff
strong.description: Climbing, jumping, lifting, fighting, breaking things

smart.name: Smart Stuff
smart.description: Solving puzzles, remembering facts, noticing clues

kind.name: Kind Stuff
kind.description: Talking, making friends, helping others, calming animals

SetupAdventure.title: Setup Your Adventure!
SetupAdventure.subtitle: Tell us about your hero and the kind of adventure you want to go on!

length.label: How long should the adventure be?

inspiration.label: Any ideas for the story? (Optional)
inspiration.placeholder: Tell us what you'd like to happen... (a lost kitten, a hidden treasure, etc.)

validation.nameRequired: Please give your hero a name!

SetupAdventure.error: Oops! Something went wrong. Please try again.

Play.inputPlaceholder: What do you want to do?

PlanningError.title: Oops! Something went wrong
PlanningError.description: We couldn't create your adventure right now.
